mapper.insert:
SELECT EXAM.SEQ_EXAM_STUDENT_ANSWER_DETAIL.nextval from dual
INSERT INTO EXAM_STUDENT_ANSWER_DETAIL( ID, STUDENT_ANSWER_ID, QUESTION_ID, ANSWER_CONTENT, SCORE )VALUES( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{studentAnswerId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{questionId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{answerContent,jdbcType=BLOB}, #{score,jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.update: UPDATE EXAM_STUDENT_ANSWER_DETAIL SET STUDENT_ANSWER_ID=#{studentAnswerId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, QUESTION_ID=#{questionId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, ANSWER_CONTENT=#{answerContent,jdbcType=BLOB}, SCORE=#{score,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, REVIEWER_ID=#{reviewerId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, REVIEW_DATE=SYSDATE WHERE ID=#{id}
